originalTitle: The August stock-market slump is a myth — so why does Wall Street keep repeating it?
summary: More than 200 years of data show stocks typically gain in August, while market volatility sits well below average.
content: More than 200 years of data show stocks typically gain in August, while market volatility sits well below average.
chineseTitle: 八月股市暴跌是一个神话——那么为什么华尔街不断重蹈覆辙呢？
chineseSummary: 200 多年的数据显示，股市通常在 8 月份上涨，而市场波动性远低于平均水平。
chineseContent: 200 多年的数据显示，股市通常在 8 月份上涨，而市场波动性远低于平均水平。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
